info.name: Web Agency Backend API
info.description: Complete API collection for the Web Agency Backend including authentication, blogs, contacts, inquiries, newsletter, and plans management.

request.description: Login with admin credentials. Returns JWT token and refresh token.
Refresh the access token using a valid refresh token.
Get the current admin's profile information.
Update the current admin's profile.
Change the current admin's password.
Verify if the current token is valid.
Logout the current admin.
Get published blogs with optional filters. Sort: views, likes, oldest
Get featured/popular blogs sorted by views and likes.
Get all blog categories with post counts.
Get all blog tags with counts (top 50).
Get a single blog post by its slug. Also returns related blogs.
Like a blog post.
Get all blogs including drafts. Status: published, draft

body.raw:
{ "title": "My New Blog Post", "slug": "my-new-blog-post", "content": "

Full blog content here...

", "excerpt": "A brief summary of the blog post.", "featuredImage": "https://example.com/image.jpg", "categories": ["technology", "web-development"], "tags": ["nodejs", "express", "api"], "isPublished": false, "metaTitle": "SEO Title for the blog", "metaDescription": "SEO description for search engines" }

request.description: Create a new blog post.
Update an existing blog post.
Publish or unpublish a blog post.
Soft delete a blog post.
Restore a soft-deleted blog post.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john@example.com",
    "phone": "+1234567890",
    "company": "Acme Inc",
    "subject": "Project Inquiry",
    "message": "I would like to discuss a new web project..."
}

request.description: Submit a contact form. Auto-detects priority based on keywords.
Get all contacts. Status: new, read, replied, closed, spam. Priority: low, medium, high, urgent
Get contact statistics including counts by status.
Get a single contact. Automatically marks as read.
Update contact status.
Reply to a contact message.
Mark a contact as spam.
Soft delete a contact.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Jane Smith",
    "email": "jane@company.com",
    "phone": "+1234567890",
    "company": "Tech Corp",
    "website": "https://techcorp.com",
    "projectType": "webapp",
    "budget": "25k-50k",
    "timeline": "2-3months",
    "description": "We need a custom web application for internal operations...",
    "requirements": ["user-auth", "dashboard", "reporting", "api-integration"]
}

request.description: Submit a project inquiry. projectType: website, webapp, mobile, ecommerce, redesign, maintenance, consulting, other. budget: under-5k, 5k-10k, 10k-25k, 25k-50k, 50k-100k, over-100k, not-sure. timeline: asap, 1-month, 2-3months, 3-6months, 6months+, flexible
Get all inquiries with filters.
Get inquiry statistics: by status, project type, follow-up due.
Get inquiries that are due for follow-up.
Get full inquiry details including notes and status history.
Update inquiry status. Status: new, reviewing, contacted, quoted, negotiating, accepted, rejected, completed, cancelled
Assign inquiry to an admin.
Set a quote for the inquiry.
Add a note to the inquiry.
Set a follow-up date for the inquiry.
Soft delete an inquiry.
Subscribe to newsletter. Requires email confirmation (double opt-in).
Confirm newsletter subscription via token from email.
Unsubscribe from newsletter. Reason: too-many, not-relevant, never-subscribed, other
Get all newsletter subscribers.
Get newsletter statistics including growth metrics.
Get subscriber details.
Update subscriber tags for segmentation.
Track email open (for tracking pixel).
Track email link click.
Delete a subscriber permanently.
Get active plans. category: website, webapp, ecommerce, maintenance, hosting, consulting, bundle. billingCycle: monthly, quarterly, yearly, one-time, custom
Get featured or popular plans.
Compare 2-4 plans side by side with feature matrix.
Get plan categories with counts.
Get a single plan by its slug.
Get all plans including inactive/archived.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Business Website",
    "slug": "business-website",
    "description": "Complete business website solution with all essential features.",
    "shortDescription": "For growing businesses",
    "price": 2499,
    "originalPrice": 2999,
    "currency": "USD",
    "billingCycle": "one-time",
    "category": "website",
    "targetAudience": "small-business",
    "features": [
        { "name": "Pages", "included": true, "value": "Up to 10 pages" },
        { "name": "SEO Optimization", "included": true, "highlight": true },
        { "name": "Contact Form", "included": true },
        { "name": "Blog Integration", "included": true },
        { "name": "E-commerce", "included": false }
    ],
    "limits": {
        "pages": 10,
        "storage": "5GB",
        "revisions": 3,
        "supportLevel": "priority"
    },
    "isPopular": true,
    "badge": "Best Value",
    "ctaText": "Start Your Project",
    "order": 2
}

request.description: Create a new plan.
Update an existing plan.
Activate or deactivate a plan.
Archive a plan.
Restore an archived plan.
Duplicate a plan with a new slug.
Reorder plans.
Delete a plan permanently.
Check server health. Add ?detailed=true for memory info.
Check if the service is ready (database connected).
